artifacts.title: Hello World to Launch Stack: pedagogy-driven production infrastructure
Substrate-wide v1.0.0 commissioning: collectives + operators + migrators
Six harnesses commissioned to v1.0.0 with LDT proof-pair audit pattern
Launch-gate proof grammar: six schema families × hello-world-google v1.0.0-b1
WrkstrmReleaseArtifactUI: 7 SwiftUI viewers consume the proof grammar

bodyMarkdown:
## Vault Location Data

- Place: substrate-wide v1.0.0 commissioning surface
- Substrate path: private/universal/substrate/collectives/ + harnesses/ (six)
- Moment ref: claude-v100-launch-gate-2026-05-08-to-2026-05-15
- Evidence: chronicle entries [23]-[30]

## Context

- A week-long substrate-wide commissioning push.
- Hello-World-to-Launch-Stack establishes pedagogy-driven production infrastructure (educational on-ramp → real production gates).
- Substrate-wide v1.0.0 commissioning lands across collectives, operators, and migrators.
- Six harnesses commissioned to v1.0.0 with LDT proof-pair audit pattern.
- The launch-gate proof grammar (six schema families × hello-world-google v1.0.0-b1 honest-blocked receipts) lands as the canonical release-gate contract.
- WrkstrmReleaseArtifactUI ships 7 SwiftUI viewers that consume the proof grammar — first end-to-end loop from gate → typed receipt → renderer.

## Note

This chapter establishes claude as substrate-wide release-discipline contributor, not just per-package shipper.
contextLines: Substrate-wide v1.0.0 across collectives + operators + migrators + six harnesses.
Launch-gate proof grammar + WrkstrmReleaseArtifactUI close the gate→receipt→renderer loop.
headline: Substrate-wide v1.0.0 commissioning + launch-gate proof grammar lands the release-discipline contract.

sourceRefs.t: Chronicle entries [23]–[30] (Hello-World, v1.0.0 commissioning, launch-gate, WrkstrmReleaseArtifactUI)

summary: May 8–15: claude pushes Hello-World-to-Launch-Stack pedagogy, substrate-wide v1.0.0 commissioning across collectives + operators + migrators + six harnesses, the launch-gate proof grammar (six families × hello-world-google honest-blocked receipts), and WrkstrmReleaseArtifactUI with 7 SwiftUI viewers — closing the first gate → typed receipt → renderer loop.
